description: Kubernetes payments service — review namespace isolation, pod security, and exposure
review_checklist: Check for NetworkPolicy isolation in sensitive namespaces
Verify TLS termination on user-facing services

ground_truth.description: automountServiceAccountToken=true exposes API token in payments pod — attacker who compromises one pod gets cluster API access
Container has no resources.limits — single bad request can exhaust node CPU/memory, kill other pods
Sensitive namespace 'payments' has no NetworkPolicy — any pod in cluster can reach payments-api
Service type=LoadBalancer exposes payments API to public internet — should be ClusterIP behind ingress with WAF
Service routes plain HTTP port 80 to TLS port 8443 — TLS terminated at LoadBalancer, traffic in cluster is plaintext
